features: smart dual light: IR 60m + white LED 40m

built-in analytics: Smart Motion Detection (People Detection, Vehicle Detection), Smart Intrusion Protection (, People Line Crossing Detection, People Intrusion Detection, People Enter Area Detection, People Exit Area Detection, ...
detection range: detection: 81.0m-405.0m, observation: 32.4m-162.0m, recognition: 16.2m-81.0m, identification: 8.1m-40.5m
ONVIF Compliant: Yes, Profile S, Profile G, Profile T, Profile M
ONVIF confirmed, but no Network Protocol & Service / RTSP row on official spec sheet -- protocols left unconfirmed

cross-checked against the official downloadable PDF datasheet -- it mentions RTSP only inside a Security row ('HTTP/RTSP/ONVIF(WSSE)' authentication schemes), not in an explicit Network Protocol & Service list, so protocols remain unconfirmed per this project's standard
